title: System 98 (Windows 98 Themed GUI)
body:
System 98: A Windows 98 Themed GUI Overhaul

System 98 is a complete GUI overhaul that brings the charm of Windows 98 to Minecraft! Every button, window, and menu has been redesigned to serve as a pixel-perfect homage to the golden age of computers.

This pack is for anyone who appreciates retro aesthetics, clean interfaces, and a dose of 90s nostalgia.

Key Features:

Classic Containers: All interactive blocks (chests, crafting tables, furnaces, etc.) now feature the classic window style.
Redesigned HUD: The hotbar, health, hunger, and XP have been reimagined with a clean and retro feel.
Pixel-Perfect Buttons & Widgets: Every button, slider, and scrollbar has been crafted to match the classic look of that era.

This is a vanilla pack.
This pack does not require OptiFine or other mods like it.

[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/PekitP)

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pekitp/projects)

[PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pekitp/)
